testsuite.name: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_existingPaymentPosition.User pays a payment carts from existing payment position via nodoInviaCarrelloRPT

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_existingPaymentPosition.User pays a payment carts from existing payment position via nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with single RPT without stamp that exists already in GPD

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_existingPaymentPosition.User pays a payment carts from existing payment position via nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with single RPT with multiple transfers that exists already in GPD

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_existingPaymentPosition.User pays a payment carts from existing payment position via nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: Scenario: User pays a cart with single RPT with one stamp that exists already in GPD

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_existingPaymentPosition.User pays a payment carts from existing payment position via nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with two RPTs without stamp of which one already exists in GPD

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_existingPaymentPosition.User pays a payment carts from existing payment position via nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User pays a cart with two RPTs with multiple transfers that exists already in GPD

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_existingPaymentPosition.User pays a payment carts from existing payment position via nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: Scenario: User pays a cart with two RPTs with at least on stamp that exists already in GPD

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_existingPaymentPosition.User pays a payment carts from existing payment position via nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a cart with single RPT that exists already in GPD in invalid state

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_existingPaymentPosition.User pays a payment carts from existing payment position via nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a cart with single RPT that was inserted from ACA and is in valid state

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_existingPaymentPosition.User pays a payment carts from existing payment position via nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a cart with single RPT that was inserted from ACA and is in invalid state

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_existingPaymentPosition.User pays a payment carts from existing payment position via nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a cart with two RPTs that exists already in GPD in invalid state

failure.message: There is no error matching the one searched in the field_name: operation_error_code

testcase.name: User tries to pay a cart with two RPTs that was inserted from ACA and is in valid state

testcase.name: User tries to pay a multibeneficiary cart that exists already in GPD in invalid state

testcase.classname: features.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT.nodoInviaCarrelloRPT_existingPaymentPosition.User pays a payment carts from existing payment position via nodoInviaCarrelloRPT
testcase.name: User tries to pay a multibeneficiary cart that was inserted from ACA and is in valid state

testcase.name: User pays a multibeneficiary cart that exists already in GPD
